name: Cranberry Orange Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (160°C).
2. Mix sugar, margarine, and orange peel in a bowl.
3. Gradually add flour until dough forms.
4. Stir in cranberries and almonds.
5. Form into two long logs and place on baking sheet.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Turn off oven heat.
8. Allow to cool completely before slicing.
